summary: Iteration 33 - Tested 5 new enhancements: 1) Welcome email on sign-up, 2) Email templates system (email_base function), 3) Landing page with 9 feature cards and stats row, 4) 150 streaming platforms in distribution, 5) Wider sign-up form with side-by-side fields. All 20 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend tests passed. Welcome email function is triggered during registration (logs show email attempt, fails due to Resend test mode - expected behavior).
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/distributions/stores returns exactly 150 platforms
Backend: Each store has store_id, store_name, icon, and region fields
Backend: Stores include major global platforms (Spotify, Apple Music, Amazon, YouTube, Tidal, Deezer)
Backend: Stores include African platforms (Boomplay, Mdundo, 5+ stores)
Backend: Stores include Indian platforms (JioSaavn, Gaana, Wynk, 4+ stores)
Backend: Stores include Asian platforms (KKBOX, LINE MUSIC, Melon, 10+ stores)
Backend: Stores include Latin American platforms (5+ stores)
Backend: Stores include Russian platforms (Yandex Music, VK Music, 3+ stores)
Backend: Stores include Middle East platforms (Anghami, 2+ stores)
Backend: All major regions represented (Global, Africa, India, Asia, Latin America, Russia, Middle East)
Backend: POST /api/auth/forgot-password endpoint exists and works
Backend: POST /api/auth/reset-password endpoint exists
Backend: GET /api/auth/verify-reset-token endpoint exists
Backend: POST /api/auth/register triggers welcome email (logs show attempt)
Backend: Registration returns user data without password_hash or _id
Backend: Login with admin credentials works
Backend: Login with invalid credentials returns 401
Backend: GET /api/auth/me requires authentication
Backend: Stores endpoint responds in < 2 seconds
Backend: email_routes.py has send_welcome_email function (line 58)
Backend: email_routes.py has email_base template wrapper function (line 45)
Frontend: Landing page hero section loads with typewriter effect
Frontend: Landing page distribution section present
Frontend: Landing page features section has 'Everything You Need to Win' heading

Frontend: Landing page has 9 feature cards (AI Release Strategy, Real-Time Analytics, Revenue & Royalty Calculator, Release Leaderboard, Goal Tracking & Milestones, Artist Public Profile, Fan Analytics, AI Smart Notifications, Beat Marketplace)
Frontend: Landing page stats row shows '150+' Streaming Platforms
Frontend: Landing page stats row shows '100%' Royalties
Frontend: Landing page stats row shows '24/7' Analytics
Frontend: Landing page stats row shows 'AI' Strategy
Frontend: Register page form is wider (max-w-[680px])
Frontend: Register page has 2-column layout for Name + Stage Name
Frontend: Register page has 2-column layout for Password + Confirm Password
Frontend: Register page has 3-column layout for State/Town/PostCode
Frontend: Register page Terms text shows 'I Agree' in magenta color
Frontend: Register page Terms text shows 'Terms & Conditions' in purple
Frontend: Register page Terms text shows 'Privacy Policy' in purple
Frontend: Register page subtitle says '150+ platforms worldwide'
Frontend: Register page has reCAPTCHA widget
Frontend: Register page has Artist/Producer role toggle
Frontend: Release detail page distribution section shows 'Distribution — 150 Platforms'
Frontend: Release detail page has store search input

Frontend: Release detail page has 19 region filter buttons (All, Global, North America, China, Africa, Middle East, India, Asia, Japan, South Korea, Southeast Asia, Russia, Latin America, Europe, Turkey, Caribbean, Indonesia, Vietnam, Brazil)
Frontend: Release detail page has Select All/Deselect All button
Frontend: Release detail page shows store count (150/150 selected)
Frontend: Release detail page has scrollable store grid (max-h-[400px])
critical_code_review_comments: Welcome email function correctly triggered during registration via asyncio.ensure_future
Email sending fails gracefully when RESEND_API_KEY not configured (logs warning, doesn't break registration)
email_base function provides reusable branded email template wrapper
DSP_STORES array contains exactly 150 platforms with proper region field
All major global regions represented in store list
Register form properly uses grid layouts for side-by-side fields
Distribution section has proper search, filter, and selection controls
seed_data_creation: Created test release 'Test Release for Distribution' (rel_248587ad938c) for distribution section testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 33 tested 5 enhancements: 1) Welcome email - send_welcome_email() in email_routes.py line 58, triggered during registration, logs show attempt (fails in test mode due to Resend restrictions - expected). 2) Email templates - email_base() function at line 45 provides branded wrapper. 3) Landing page - 9 feature cards in 3x3 grid, stats row with 150+/100%/24/7/AI. 4) 150 platforms - GET /api/distributions/stores returns exactly 150 stores with regions (Global, Africa, India, Asia, etc.). 5) Register form - max-w-[680px], 2-col for Name+Stage, Password+Confirm, 3-col for State/Town/PostCode, colored Terms text (I Agree=magenta, links=purple). Release detail distribution section has search, 19 region filters, Select All, scrollable grid.

mocked_apis.note: Email sending may be skipped if RESEND_API_KEY not configured - check logs for 'Email skipped' or 'Email failed' messages. This is expected behavior.

welcome_email.status: Working (email attempt logged, fails in Resend test mode)
